reports.doc_title: Town Nantucket Soil and Groundwater Sampling Results Email&Letter.pdf
reports.sample_location_label: NANTUCKET, MA Field Prep: Not Specified
reports.summary_text:
From: Brolowski, Navpreet (DEP)
To: LGibson@nantucket‐ma.gov
Cc: Gregg Tivnan; Chuck Larson; John D. Hedden; Gallagher, Angela (DEP)
Subject: Town Nantucket Soil and Groundwater Sampling Results Letter
Date: Thursday, January 16, 2025 10:27:00 AM
Attachments: Town Nantucket Soil and Groundwater Sampling Results Letter.pdf
Good morning,
Attached is the results letter for the soil and groundwater sampling conducted by MassDEP’s
contractor Verdantas in December 2024. We are still waiting on GW elevation data. The full
site investigation report will be provided when received and reviewed. Feel free to call if you
have any questions.
Thank you,
Navpreet
Navpreet (Nav) Brolowski, P.E., LSP
(she, her)
Branch Chief, Site Management
Bureau of Waste Site Cleanup
Southeast Regional Office
Phone:(857) 301-3356
Email: navpreet.brolowski@mass.gov
20 Riverside Dr
Lakeville, MA 02347
Maura T. Healey Rebecca L. Tepper
Governor Secretary
Kimberley Driscoll Bonnie Heiple
Lieutenant Governor Commissioner
January 16, 2025
C. Elizabeth Gibson, Town Manager RE: NANTUCKET– BWSC
Nantucket Town Hall SOIL AND GROUNDWATER SAMPLING
16 Broad Street RESULTS
Nantucket, Massachusetts 02554 Multiple Locations
Email: LGibson@nantucket-ma.gov
Dear Ms. Gibson:
The Massachusetts Department of Environmental Protection, Bureau of Waste Site Cleanup (MassDEP or the
Department), is tasked with ensuring the cleanup of oil and hazardous material releases pursuant to the
Massachusetts Oil and Hazardous Material Release Prevention and Response Act, Massachusetts General
Law (M.G.L.) c. 21E (Chapter 21E), and 310 Code of Massachusetts Regulations (CMR) 40.0000, the
Massachusetts Contingency Plan (MCP). Both M.G.L. c. 21E and the MCP require the performance of
response actions to provide for the protection from harm to health, safety, public welfare, and the
environment which may result from releases and/or threats of releases of oil and/or hazardous materials at
disposal sites.
REASON FOR THIS LETTER
This letter
